diff: The `retainable` parameter specifies whether the whitehat hacker may retain the bounty out of the funds recovered or must first return the entire recovered amount to the Asset Recovery Address before receiving payment from the protocol. The value of the `retainable` parameter is `false`.

The `retainable` parameter specifies whether the whitehat hacker may retain the bounty out of the funds recovered or must first return the entire recovered amount to the Asset Recovery Address before receiving payment from the protocol. The value of the `retainable` parameter is `false`.
